resultList.dtldesc: Located in the well-established and culturally vibrant neighbourhood of Chittaranjan Park, this newly built 3 BHK builder floor apartment offers a refined blend of modern design and everyday comfort. Situated in Block B, one of South Delhis most sought-after residential pockets, the property is ideal for families seeking a well-connected and premium living environment.Property SpecificationsThis thoughtfully designed apartment is positioned on the 3rd floor and showcases a contemporary layout with high-quality finishes throughout. The home comprises three spacious bedrooms, three well-appointed bathrooms, a dedicated dining area, and a separate drawing room, ensuring a comfortable and functional living experience. Both the front and rear sides feature covered balconies with elegant glass exteriors, enhancing natural light and ventilation while adding to the aesthetic appeal.The interiors are finished with uniform tile flooring across all rooms, while the bathrooms are fitted with anti-skid tiles for added safety. The modular kitchen is well-equipped with granite countertops, hydraulic cabinets, a stainless steel sink, and a piped gas connection, offering both convenience and modern utility. All bathrooms are designed in a western style, with one attached to the master bedroom and the remaining two serving as common facilities.The apartment comes fitted with modern electrical fixtures and essential installations including Mitsubishi air conditioners, geysers, and exhaust fans across rooms, ensuring immediate usability. Electrical connections and metering are already in place, supporting a hassle-free move-in experience.FacilitiesThe property includes one open parking space for resident convenience. Security is managed by the Resident Welfare Association, with CCTV surveillance ensuring a safe and secure environment. The building reflects a well-maintained residential setup suitable for peaceful family living. It is important to note that the apartment does not include roof rights.LocalityChittaranjan Park is a prime residential locality in South Delhi, known for its strong community culture and excellent infrastructure. The area offers seamless access to reputed schools, colleges, healthcare facilities, temples, and daily conveniences, making it highly suitable for family living. Well-connected metro stations and road networks ensure smooth commuting to key parts of Delhi and NCR. With its blend of connectivity, social infrastructure, and established neighbourhood charm, this location continues to be a preferred residential destination.

Developed by Signature Global Pvt. Ltd., a trusted leader in quality real estate, this is an opportunity for long-term value appreciation. Don’t miss out on securing your future today.
resultList.dtldesc: Embrace a modern lifestyle in this elegantly designed 2 BHK apartment located in the rapidly developing hub of Sohna Sector 36, Gurgaon. Spanning a super built-up area of 822 sq. ft, this residence offers a well-planned layout that maximises every inch of space to provide a comfortable and functional home. Situated within a contemporary multi-storey complex, the apartment is positioned to receive ample natural light and cross-ventilation, creating a refreshing living environment. This property represents an excellent opportunity for young professionals and small families looking for a high-quality home in a scenic location that perfectly balances urban connectivity with a peaceful residential atmosphere.Property SpecificationsThe apartment features two well-proportioned bedrooms and two modern bathrooms, designed with premium fittings and a focus on contemporary aesthetics. The living and dining area is spacious and connects seamlessly to a private balcony, offering a pleasant spot to unwind while enjoying views of the surrounding landscaped greens. The kitchen is designed for efficiency, with high-quality counter-tops and adequate storage space for culinary essentials. Finished with durable and stylish vitrified tile flooring throughout, the interiors provide a sophisticated look that is easy to maintain. The property is currently in a ready-to-move-in condition, ensuring a hassle-free transition for its new owners.FacilitiesResidents have access to a comprehensive range of world-class facilities within the gated community, designed to enhance the quality of life. The project includes dedicated covered parking for residents and ample visitor parking. Security is a top priority, with 247 manned security, CCTV surveillance, and controlled access points. To ensure uninterrupted comfort, the building is equipped with a high-speed lift and a robust power backup system for both common areas and individual units. Additional lifestyle amenities such as a well-equipped gymnasium, a clubhouse for social gatherings, and dedicated play areas for children are available, providing a holistic living experience.LocalitySohna Sector 36 is ideally located along the Sohna Elevated Road, ensuring swift connectivity to the main business districts of Gurgaon, including Golf Course Extension Road and Subhash Chowk. The locality is home to several reputed educational institutions such as GD Goenka World School and KR Mangalam University, making it a preferred choice for families. For healthcare needs, multi-speciality hospitals are located within a short drive. The area is also well-served by local shopping complexes and daily necessity stores. With the upcoming infrastructural developments in the South Gurgaon region, residents can enjoy a well-connected lifestyle while being surrounded by the picturesque Aravalli foothills.

resultList.ad_text: Sale  Individual Gurgaon Delhi NCR India Signature Global Park 5125395 Manish OID 9314321 Power Back Up Lift Rain Water Harvesting Club House Swimming Pool Gymnasium Park Reserved Parking Security Intercom Facility Maintenance Staff Waste Disposal DTH Television Facility Jogging and Strolling Track   Sale Price 8100000  Rent Price 0 New Construction 822 Sq-ft Resale East Facing  Freehold Semi-Furnished 1 Floor   Bedrooms 2  Bathrooms 2 74827689 f1e9c540-ece0-4187-8a55-2dcf50831a0f_tpm Embrace a modern lifestyle in this elegantly designed 2 BHK apartment located in the rapidly developing hub of Sohna Sector 36, Gurgaon. Spanning a super built-up area of 822 sq. ft, this residence offers a well-planned layout that maximises every inch of space to provide a comfortable and functional home. Situated within a contemporary multi-storey complex, the apartment is positioned to receive ample natural light and cross-ventilation, creating a refreshing living environment. This property represents an excellent opportunity for young professionals and small families looking for a high-quality home in a scenic location that perfectly balances urban connectivity with a peaceful residential atmosphere.Property SpecificationsThe apartment features two well-proportioned bedrooms and two modern bathrooms, designed with premium fittings and a focus on contemporary aesthetics. The living and dining area is spacious and connects seamlessly to a private balcony, offering a pleasant spot to unwind while enjoying views of the surrounding landscaped greens. The kitchen is designed for efficiency, with high-quality counter-tops and adequate storage space for culinary essentials. Finished with durable and stylish vitrified tile flooring throughout, the interiors provide a sophisticated look that is easy to maintain. The property is currently in a ready-to-move-in condition, ensuring a hassle-free transition for its new owners.FacilitiesResidents have access to a comprehensive range of world-class facilities within the gated community, designed to enhance the quality of life. The project includes dedicated covered parking for residents and ample visitor parking. Security is a top priority, with 247 manned security, CCTV surveillance, and controlled access points. To ensure uninterrupted comfort, the building is equipped with a high-speed lift and a robust power backup system for both common areas and individual units. Additional lifestyle amenities such as a well-equipped gymnasium, a clubhouse for social gatherings, and dedicated play areas for children are available, providing a holistic living experience.LocalitySohna Sector 36 is ideally located along the Sohna Elevated Road, ensuring swift connectivity to the main business districts of Gurgaon, including Golf Course Extension Road and Subhash Chowk. The locality is home to several reputed educational institutions such as GD Goenka World School and KR Mangalam University, making it a preferred choice for families. For healthcare needs, multi-speciality hospitals are located within a short drive. The area is also well-served by local shopping complexes and daily necessity stores. With the upcoming infrastructural developments in the South Gurgaon region, residents can enjoy a well-connected lifestyle while being surrounded by the picturesque Aravalli foothills.
